description_long: This is a stylized adult male character with spiky hair and tribal face markings, dressed in a short-sleeved, collared shirt with vertical stripes and loose pants. He wears a single shoulder armor piece on his left side and has a forearm guard wrapping his right arm. A large axe is strapped diagonally across his back, secured by a blue belt and harness. His footwear consists of sturdy boots, and his hands are open and relaxed at his sides. The character's overall appearance suggests a blend of urban and fantasy influences, with practical accessories for both protection and combat.
description: A stylized adult male with spiky hair, tribal face markings, armor, and an axe strapped to his back, dressed in loose urban-fantasy attire.
description_view_0: Front view shows the character's facial markings, spiky hair, chest armor, and the axe handle over his right shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the axe's blade, the arm guard on the right arm, and the profile of the spiky hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the axe strapped across the back, the shoulder armor, and the blue belt.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the arm guard wrapping the left forearm and the side profile of the boots and harness.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved collared shirt, loose pants, single shoulder armor, forearm guard, utility belt
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
